overview: Swami Event Manager is a complete business management platform for Swami Light & Sound — a sound and lighting rental company. It helps manage bookings, equipment inventory, staff assignments, packages, invoicing with Stripe payments, logistics tracking, and analytics — all from a mobile-first interface.
features: Role-based access for Admin, Staff, and Clients
Multi-step booking flow with real-time quotations
Equipment inventory with QR codes and availability tracking
Package builder with predefined and custom packages
Stripe invoice payments with partial/advance payment support
Analytics dashboard with revenue trends and equipment insights
Logistics tracking with dispatch status and checklists
Client portal for booking history and quotations
Dark and light mode, mobile-first UI
